stemHtml: In a radio altimeter, the height measurement is based upon…

options.a: a pulse transmission, for which time between transmission and reception is measured on a circular scanning screen.
options.b: a wave transmission, for which the frequency shift by DOPPLER effect after ground reflection is measured.
options.c: a frequency modulation wave, for which the frequency difference between the transmitted wave and the received wave after ground reflection is measured.
options.d: a triangular amplitude modulation wave, for which modulation phase shift between transmitted and received waves after ground reflection is measured.
